articles.description: The world waits for Trump's verdict after the talks failed to yield a deal, writes the BBC's Lyse Doucet.

topStories.title: After Iran talks falter, will Trump escalate or negotiate?
topStories.description: The world waits for Trump's verdict after the talks failed to yield a deal, writes the BBC's Lyse Doucet.

topStories.title: US-Iran ceasefire talks: What are the key sticking points?
topStories.description: Talks between Iran and the US expose deep divisions, prolonging uncertainty during a two-week ceasefire.

topStories.title: Modi govt. wants to put caste census in cold storage: Congress
topStories.description: The Congress has accused the Modi government of playing politics in the name of the women's reservation law and asserted that the proposed delimitation exercise linked to it was "not constitutional"

topStories.title: Who is running US foreign policy? Varsha Gandikota and Jeremy Scahill
topStories.description: Varsha Gandikota-Nellutla asks journalist Jeremy Scahill who will benefit from the US-Israel war on Iran.

topStories.title: Special session on sacrilege law an attempt by AAP Government to cover up its failures: Punjab Cong chief
topStories.description: The state Congress chief asked why the AAP had "failed" to punish those responsible for the sacrilege and the later killing of protesters. He was referring to the series of sacrilege incidents in 2015, the protests that followed, and the killing of two Sikhs in police firing at the protesters

topStories.title: Kannur dental college student death raises questions about casteism in campuses
topStories.description: Parents alleged that certain faculty members discriminated against Nithin Raj on caste lines and showed a skin tone bias; CPI(M), Congress, and student organisations cutting across political lines have condemned the incident and demanded a comprehensive enquiry

topStories.title: Probe Agency ED In Overdrive In Bengal, Launches Action In Flurry Of Cases
topStories.description: Throughout late March and early April 2026, the federal agency has targeted political heavyweights, senior officials, and corporate entities, uncovering hawala transactions.

topStories.title: ‘US failed to gain trust of Iranian delegation’, says Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf as he explains why talks failed
topStories.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on Sunday (local time) revealed why the talks between the US and Iran in Islamabad failed. The talks, which spanned over 21 hours, concluded with both sides blaming each other.

topStories.title: Deported migrants arrive in Costa Rica from the US
topStories.description: Costa Rica has received 25 people deported by the US as the first wave of an agreement between the two countries.

topStories.title: BJP issues whip as Modi seeks support across party lines for women quota rollout
topStories.description: Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge questioned the timing of the special sitting for the rollout and convening it without taking them into confidence

topStories.title: IDF uncovers Hezbollah weapons stash inside hospital in Lebanon
topStories.description: Israeli Defense Forces uncovered a weapons stash used by Hezbollah terrorists inside a hospital in Lebanon this weekend.

topStories.title: Catholic nuns caring for dying patients fight New York trans rule, face jail time
topStories.description: Catholic nuns sue New York over a law requiring nursing homes to follow gender identity rules, saying it forces them to choose faith or mission.

dailyNews.title: IDF uncovers Hezbollah weapons stash inside hospital in Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Israeli Defense Forces uncovered a weapons stash used by Hezbollah terrorists inside a hospital in Lebanon this weekend.

dailyNews.title: Catholic nuns caring for dying patients fight New York trans rule, face jail time
dailyNews.description: Catholic nuns sue New York over a law requiring nursing homes to follow gender identity rules, saying it forces them to choose faith or mission.

dailyNews.title: Ex-Biden staffer claims accidental shot killed girlfriend as dad blasts toxic, abusive relationship: report
dailyNews.description: The father of Samantha Emge, allegedly killed by ex-Biden staffer boyfriend Nation Wood, claims red flags and abuse in their relationship.

dailyNews.title: Early Parkinson’s symptoms misdiagnosed for years, Terry Crews’ wife reveals
dailyNews.description: Terry Crews' wife Rebecca King Crews reveals her Parkinson's disease diagnosis and shares how a new non-invasive brain procedure eased her symptoms. Experts discuss the early-onset condition.

dailyNews.title: The AI revolution threatens office jobs, but revives demand for skilled trades
dailyNews.description: AI threatens white-collar jobs more than blue-collar trades, highlighting an urgent need to realign education with workforce demands in America.

dailyNews.title: Appeals court says federal judge must reconsider blocking WH ballroom, weigh national security concerns
dailyNews.description: A three-judge appeals panel ruled Trump's $400 million White House ballroom construction can proceed until Friday as security concerns are reviewed.

dailyNews.title: JONATHAN TURLEY: Liberal justice's swipe at Kavanaugh latest sign of SCOTUS' slipping standards
dailyNews.description: Justice Sotomayor took a personal dig at Justice Kavanaugh, calling him an out-of-touch elitist during a University of Kansas law school appearance.

dailyNews.title: Rick Harrison of 'Pawn Stars' says gambling isn't dying even as Las Vegas poker rooms close one by one
dailyNews.description: Las Vegas tourism dropped 7.5% in 2025 as poker rooms closed one by one on the Strip, but Rick Harrison said in-person gambling is still far from dying out.

dailyNews.title: Outrage builds over illegal immigrant ‘invasion’ after suspect allegedly executes teen who begged for life
dailyNews.description: The killing of Missouri teen Miles Young, who allegedly begged for his life during a deadly ambush, sparks Republican outrage over immigration policies.

dailyNews.title: Montana ranch tied to ‘Yellowstone’ universe hits market for $16.3M
dailyNews.description: Two Feathers Ranch, a 357-acre luxury estate next to the "Yellowstone" filming location in Darby, Montana, hits the market for $16.3 million.

dailyNews.title: Former supermodel says celebrities need to 'wake up' and recognize Christian fans
dailyNews.description: Ex-Sports Illustrated model Kim Alexis says navigating the modeling industry as a Christian was tricky, but staying true to her faith brought her peace.

dailyNews.title: Ukraine, Russia claim thousands of violations of Putin-imposed holiday ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin's 32-hour Orthodox Easter ceasefire appeared to unravel as Russia and Ukraine traded accusations of thousands of violations, deepening mutual mistrust.

dailyNews.title: US soccer captain's breakup with golfer gets messy after dating profile allegations
dailyNews.description: USMNT captain Christian Pulisic and girlfriend Alexa Melton appear to have split, with Melton suggesting he was on celebrity dating app Raya.

dailyNews.title: Toyota joins hydrogen truck alliance push
dailyNews.description: Toyota teams up with Daimler Truck and Volvo Group to scale hydrogen fuel-cell technology for heavy-duty trucks through the Cellcentric partnership.

topStories.title: After Iran talks falter, will Trump escalate or negotiate?
topStories.description: The world waits for Trump's verdict after the talks failed to yield a deal, writes the BBC's Lyse Doucet.

topStories.title: Appeals court says federal judge must reconsider blocking WH ballroom, weigh national security concerns
topStories.description: A three-judge appeals panel ruled Trump's $400 million White House ballroom construction can proceed until Friday as security concerns are reviewed.

topStories.title: Carney casts himself as NATO defender amid Trump beef, despite Canada missing key benchmark for decades
topStories.description: PM Mark Carney defends Canada's NATO commitment amid Trump criticism, despite Canada missing the 2% defense spending benchmark since the Berlin Wall fell.

topStories.title: What Now? Vance Leaves Iran Talks Without a Deal.
topStories.description: The lack of a breakthrough after 21 hours of negotiations leaves the Trump administration facing several unpalatable options.

topStories.title: Judges Fired After Blocking Deportations of Pro-Palestinian Students
topStories.description: The immigration judges’ abrupt dismissals marked the latest efforts by the Trump administration to reshape the country’s immigration courts.

topStories.title: Postal Service, Under Pressure, Now Faces Trump’s Mail Ballot Order
topStories.description: President Trump’s executive order, which has been challenged as unconstitutional, would limit the Postal Service to sending only the ballots of voters deemed eligible.

topStories.title: Trump’s War With Iran Has Weakened America
topStories.description: The president should at long last recognize the ineptitude of his impulsive, go-it-alone approach.

topStories.title: Trump says U.S. to blockade ships in Strait of Hormuz after failed peace talks
topStories.description: Vice President JD Vance told reporters that "we have not reached an agreement" following face-to-face talks with Iranian leaders and Pakistani negotiators.

topStories.title: CBS News poll finds few see U.S. goals being met in Iran yet
topStories.description: Gas prices put pressure on pocketbooks — and President Trump's ratings — as Iran war continues.

topStories.title: Judge told to reconsider security implications of halting White House ballroom
topStories.description: The U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit said it did not have enough information to decide how much of the project can be suspended without jeopardizing the safety of the president.

topStories.title: Pope Leo issues latest rebuke of Iran conflict: "Enough with war!"
topStories.description: Pope Leo XIV offered his strongest condemnation yet of the war in Iran on Saturday, appearing to take multiple veiled shots at President Trump.

topStories.title: Trump's 250-foot 'triumphal arch' would loom over Potomac, new renderings show
topStories.description: Rep. Don Beyer said "President Trump is focused on a taxpayer-funded vanity project that would choke traffic, block our skyline, and tower over sacred ground."

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

dailyNews.title: U.S. oil slips below $100 as Trump demands reopening of Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump policies, China's biotech boom are ending Europe's pharma powerhouse era
dailyNews.description: Companies have long lamented Europe's fragmented capital markets, single-market adoption on pricing and clinical trials, and uneven reimbursement policies.

dailyNews.title: After 16 years in power, Putin's closest friend in Europe faces a pivotal election
dailyNews.description: Few leaders have done more than Hungary’s Viktor Orbán to shape the global right-wing populism that informed President Donald Trump’s MAGA project.

dailyNews.title: Appeals court rules Trump's White House ballroom construction can temporarily move forward
dailyNews.description: A federal appeals court on Saturday temporarily extended a lower court judge's order allowing the construction of Trump's White House ballroom to move forward.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Tehran blames Washington for failure at talks, citing 'trust'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Trump takes the spotlight at UFC 327 in Miami, greeting Rogan and Rubio
dailyNews.description: The main attraction early at UFC 327 on Saturday night wasn’t any of the fighters, but President Donald Trump

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Trump says Iran doing 'very poor job' of allowing oil through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump accused Iran of violating its agreement with the U.S. over the Strait of Hormuz, saying on Thursday that it was "doing a poor job" of allowing oil to pass through the waterway.
